title: Agentic Commerce Protocol: Infrastructure for a Network of Autonomous Markets
description:
**The Protocol for Agent-Led Commerce**

• The collapse of the click economy
• Information overload and the volume problem
• Delegated intent and machine decision-making
• Protocols vs. platforms
• x402, ERC-8004, NOSTR, and the machine economy
• What VIA Labs is building

**2,290 words** — The foundation essay for understanding autonomous commerce infrastructure.

title: Digital Fashion ROI — BNV 2016–2021
description:
**Case Study: The Birth of Digital Fashion Infrastructure**

• Origins: 3D product capture and digital showrooms
• Blockchain experiments and the NFT realisation
• PI Apparel conferences and industry advocacy
• ~$4.5M raised during the metaverse boom
• Digital Fashion Week activations (Paris, London, NYC, Copenhagen)
• Operational lessons from the frontier

**1,601 words** — What worked, what failed, and what the 2016-2021 period taught us about building at the edge of technological change.

title: 30 Years in Fashion: From Denim to Agents
description: Personal essay covering four eras: physical product, digital transformation, blockchain/digital fashion, and agentic commerce. Lessons learned across the value chain.
